intro: Chilita lasiacantha, also known as Lasiaocantha or Mexican Bird's Beak, is a flowering plant species within the Bignoniaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Chilita lasiacantha include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
